tooltip.message: Open and listen to PDFs using the built-in reader.
tooltip.description: Tooltip message for opening and listening to PDFs using the built-in reader.

tooltipForInspVisualDesligado.message: Enable the PDF Reader to listen to it.
tooltipForInspVisualDesligado.description: Tooltip message when the PDF Reader is disabled.

labelForInspVisualLigado.description: Label indicating that the PDF Reader is enabled.

labelForInspVisualDesligado.description: Label indicating that the PDF Reader is disabled.

labelForInspVisualBloquearAoSobrepor.description: Label for the option to lock the PDF Reader when overlaying elements.

labelForInspVisualLeitorDeTela.description: Label for the option to enable screen reader support in Visual Inspector.

labelForInspVisualOcultar.description: Label for the option to hide the PDF Reader.

btnInfo.message: 1. Open a PDF and listen to it aloud (like an audiobook).
btnInfo.description: Informational message for the PDF Reader.

info.message: 1. Open a PDF and listen to it aloud (like an audiobook).
